title: bulbophyllum zygochilum
intro: Bulbophyllum zygochilum, also known as the Yellow Bulbophyllum, is a species of orchid native to New Guinea. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum zygochilum include the potential treatment of skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote healing and prevent infection.
